helpful: Provisioned petition and BIO full texts -- the decisive inputs; the prior SCOTUS stay/GVR history is only visible there, not in the docket snapshot
statpack per-Term and originating-circuit cert base rates as the anchor to adjust from
gaps: No statpack cut for SG/US-as-petitioner grant rates -- the single strongest cert signal for cases like this one
The statpack version in the repo lacks the salience-band table the prompt tells predictors to anchor on
citation-based fedcourts query returned zero rows (corpus priors seem not to carry citation indexing for SCOTUS stay-order caselaw); each query also costs ~110MB of ranged reads
No indexed link from a docket to its prior SCOTUS trips (e.g. 24A1122) -- had to reconstruct the case history from the petition text
notes: Forward cell; skipped the CourtListener MCP since the 1-day-old snapshot plus full filed-document texts left nothing material to fetch.
